tests.test_name: Risk Assessment renders and JSON is complete for QA Manager
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager can run a Risk Assessment add-on on a BDD test file and receive complete, well-formed output — including scenario risk ratings and a risk summary — in both the display panel and the downloaded JSON.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Analyze page returns visible results after processing the uploaded test file with the Risk Assessment add-on

test_coverage.verification_step: Scenario Risk Ratings appears exactly once in the output
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The risk ratings section is present and not duplicated in the displayed results

test_coverage.verification_step: Risk Summary appears exactly once in the output
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The risk summary section is present and not duplicated in the displayed results

test_coverage.verification_step: Downloaded JSON has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The exported JSON contains no placeholder or missing data fields

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON contains a top-level risk_assessment key
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The JSON output is structured correctly with the expected root section

test_coverage.verification_step: risk_assessment section contains a non-empty scenario_risk_ratings
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Actual risk rating data was generated and included for at least one scenario

test_coverage.verification_step: scenario_risk_ratings appears exactly once in the risk_assessment section
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The JSON structure is clean with no duplicate risk rating entries
